Notice Of Motion And (Second) Motion To Compel Further Responses To Discovery Requests From Plaintiff Tyfani Hafley
Off Calendar Jul-17-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT BRACCO DIAGNOSTICS, INC.'s (Second) Motion To Compel Further Responses To Discovery Requests From Plaintiff Tyfani Hafley.

The Court adopts the report and recommendation of the judge pro tem. Plaintiff Tyfani Hafley shall serve verified Code-compliant supplemental responses to Defendant's form interrogatories and request for production of documents within 10 days of entry of the Court's order.

A proposed order is submitted by email.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR#6185, tonyvaughn@yahoo.com, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)
